message:
perf(demo): add quality caching and conditional text effects updates

Optimize VisualEffectsScreen rendering:
- Add last_quality: Cell<FxQuality> field for render quality caching
- Only update text effects animation when TextEffects demo mode is
  active, avoiding unnecessary computation during canvas effects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
